demographics.living_situation: lives independently; adult child present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain is agonizing and goes straight through to my spine, and I cannot stop throwing up even though my stomach is empty. (Reported with help from her adult child, who is with her.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly about six hours ago and has not let up — she can't keep even a sip of water down and the pain is unbearable.

symptom_narrative.character: severe, boring pain high up in the middle of the tummy that shoots straight through to the back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonizing — the worst pain she has ever had
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: upper middle of the abdomen, going right through to the spine
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and unrelenting since it began
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting up and leaning forward gives a little relief
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat makes it worse; any sip of fluid triggers more vomiting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: profuse, repeated vomiting of greenish-yellow fluid, retching even when there is nothing left to bring up; feels hot, sweaty and very weak
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, curled up or leaning forward for comfort, cannot get up or keep anything down

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: known gallstones that have caused symptoms before

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: denies any recent significant alcohol intake
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adult child is present and can help with transport

objective_data_offered.value: visibly distressed and sweaty, curled up / leaning forward on the bed, retching into a bowl containing greenish-yellow fluid
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: observed over video only; no clinician examination possible

objective_data_offered.value: the whites of her eyes look slightly yellow
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: caregiver impression over video; lighting and screen colour may mislead

objective_data_offered.value: she says her heart feels like it is racing and she feels hot and clammy
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-reported sensation, no measured vital signs available

objective_data_offered.value: feels very lightheaded and weak when she tries to sit up or stand
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: caregiver report; no home blood-pressure device available
